explanation: Dice, Cards, Pawns, and the Board itself are fundamental components found in a wide variety of traditional board games. A Ball is typically associated with sports or other physical games, not board games.
Odin, Thor, Loki, and Freya are all prominent gods and goddesses in Norse mythology. Zeus is the king of the gods in Greek mythology, making him the odd one out.

RECORD (broken record), HEART (broken heart), PROMISE (broken promise), and HOME (broken home) are all commonly described as 'broken' in an idiomatic or metaphorical sense. An ARM, however, is typically 'broken' in a literal, physical sense.
